summary: STAGEPASS iteration 5 - Verified play icon fix and LiveChat→Comments replacement. All backend tests pass (13/13). ZIP content verified with correct file changes.
passed_tests: Backend: All 13 pytest tests passed (auth, feed, chat, download)
Frontend: Home page loads with STAGEPASS PRODUCTION PACKAGE heading
Frontend: Navigation works - Feed, Dashboard, Radio, Live, Community
Frontend: Dashboard shows stats (45.2K views, $12,400 revenue, 1,200h watch time)
Frontend: Download button present and functional
ZIP Content: apps/web/src/components/stagepass/Comments.tsx EXISTS - New Comments component with data-testids (comments-section, comment-input, comment-submit, comments-empty)
ZIP Content: apps/web/src/app/api/comments/[contentId]/route.ts EXISTS - GET and POST methods with contentId param

ZIP Content: apps/web/src/components/stagepass/ContentCard.tsx VERIFIED - play icon changed from text-zinc-600 to text-white/40, hover button h-12 w-12 (not h-10 w-10), has bg-stage-mint and shadow-glowMint
ZIP Content: apps/web/src/app/(public)/content/[id]/page.tsx VERIFIED - imports Comments (not LiveChat), uses <Comments contentId=... />
ZIP Content: apps/web/src/app/(public)/page.tsx VERIFIED - hero play icon uses text-stage-mint/60 (not text-white/10), has bg-stage-mint/20 background

checks: Has CommentsProps interface with contentId: string
Has GET export for fetching comments
Has POST export for adding comments
Hover button: h-12 w-12 (was h-10 w-10)
Has bg-stage-mint/20 background for play icon

critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED APIs: Preview portal uses mock data (/api/feed returns hardcoded items, /api/auth/login only accepts demo credentials)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 verified play icon fix and LiveChat→Comments replacement in production ZIP. Key changes: 1) ContentCard.tsx play icon now vibrant (text-white/40, h-12 w-12, bg-stage-mint, shadow-glowMint), 2) content/[id]/page.tsx uses Comments component instead of LiveChat, 3) New Comments.tsx and /api/comments/[contentId]/route.ts added, 4) Hero section play icon uses stage-mint colors.
